---
applyTo: "frontend/src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}"
---

Read `AGENTS.md`, `MEMORY.md`, and `.ai/instructions/frontend.md` before editing frontend files.

Rules:
- Build the usable KIO workbench, not a landing page.
- Use GitHub Dark, compact tool-first UI patterns.
- Prefer `lucide-react` icons for buttons.
- Update `MEMORY.md` after meaningful frontend changes.
